title: Second Highest Order Per Customer
description: Retrieve the second highest order amount for each customer. Assume order amounts are distinct within each customer.
sql_solution: SELECT customer_id, amount FROM (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY amount DESC) rn FROM orders) WHERE rn = 2;
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

ranking_window = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(col("amount").desc())

result = (
    orders.withColumn("rn", row_number().over(ranking_window))
    .filter(col("rn") == 2)
    .select("customer_id", "amount")
)
